utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh , I am , my side still hurts from when you crashed into me yesterday .

utterances.text: Oh God , I am so sorry .

utterances.text: Got a job on a river boat ?

utterances.text: You know what I did not wear this suit for a year because you hated it . Well , guess what ? You are not my girlfriend anymore so ...
